title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on personal image and ethical consumption.

questions.question: Why do you think people feel the need to follow the latest fashion trends?
Should school uniforms be mandatory to reduce the pressure of fashion on teenagers?
Is it fair to blame consumers for buying cheap clothes, or is it the companies' fault?

script.text: Why do you think people feel the need to follow the latest fashion trends?
Should school uniforms be mandatory to reduce the pressure of fashion on teenagers?
Is it fair to blame consumers for buying cheap clothes, or is it the companies' fault?
Do you think the clothes we wear define who we are?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
